//: Local overrides for super-linter's default stylelint config. The repo legitimately uses conventions that stylelint-config-standard rejects by default; we relax exactly those and keep everything else.

selector-class-pattern: CSS Modules classes are camelCase (consumed as styles.x in TSX), plus third-party BEM (.react-flow__node, .ant-*) we cannot rename. Pattern allows camelCase + kebab + BEM __element/--modifier.
custom-property-pattern: --vscode-* names are dictated by the VS Code theming API (exact camelCase); renaming breaks the extension theme. Pattern allows camelCase segments.
selector-pseudo-class-no-unknown: :global is a CSS Modules directive, not a real pseudo-class.
no-descending-specificity: off for theme/override CSS where cascade source-order is intentional; reordering would risk rendering changes.
